record.field: Players register through a unique public registration link shared by the organizer. They fill in their profile (name, photo, playing role, batting/bowling details, jersey size) and submit. The organizer reviews and approves each registration before the auction begins.

Yes! AuctionChamp provides a fully digital live auction dashboard. Players are presented one by one and bids are placed in real time. The system automatically validates team budgets, tracks bid history, and marks players as sold or unsold.

Absolutely. Team owners and managers can participate in auctions from any device with a browser. The live auction display screen and bid board can be shared publicly, making remote participation seamless for all stakeholders.

Yes. AuctionChamp supports league, pool-based, knockout, round-robin, and hybrid fixture formats. With a single click, fixtures are generated automatically based on the number of teams, venues, and scheduling preferences you define.
AuctionChamp is designed to manage complete tournament seasons. You can run multiple tournaments sequentially and maintain historical data, player statistics, and auction records for every season.
Can I host it on my own domain?

AuctionChamp is a cloud-hosted platform. You can access your tournament portal via the provided URL or reach out to our team to discuss custom domain and white-labelling options for enterprise clients.
Up to 2 Tournaments Up to 10 Teams per Auction Up to 150 Players Live Auction Dashboard Player Registration Portal Basic Fixture Management PDF Player Cards Email Support

Up to 5 Tournaments Unlimited Teams Unlimited Players Live Auction + Live Display Screen Icon Player Management Automatic Fixture Generator Points Table & NRR Calculator Sponsor & Branding Management Statistics & Analytics Priority Support

Unlimited Tournaments Unlimited Teams & Players All Professional Features Custom Branding & Domain Multi-admin Access Advanced Auction Analytics Financial Reports & Excel Export Dedicated Account Manager SLA-backed Support
